title: Lovely Professional University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Lovely Professional University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lovely Professional University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Lovely Professional University:
Lovely Professional University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
